name: network_with_time
description: Demonstrates the slot-evolution vocabulary. The imaginary network starts at slot 100, advances to slot 200 via advance_to_slot, then ticks 50 more via tick_slots (reaching slot 250). A single client is then served chain-sync attributed to 'block_producer'. Every trace event carries slot: 250 as context; SlotAdvanced events record the two explicit clock advances.

peers.description: The sole block producer for this imaginary network
